About

I build systems
that scale.

I'm a results-driven Full-Stack Developer based in Kozhikode, Kerala, with 2+ years of hands-on experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade, AI-powered microservice applications.

As the sole architect of FindITQ, I designed and shipped 10 independent microservices connecting job seekers, employers, vendors, startups, and investors — from system design to production deployment.

I'm a pioneer in using Claude Code for AI-assisted rapid development, and hold AWS Developer Associate and dual Oracle Cloud certifications.

LinkedIn ↗GitHub ↗Website ↗

Projects

Things I've built.

★ Flagship● Live

FindITQ

Enterprise Talent & Investment Ecosystem

Visit Site ↗

Sole architect and developer of a multi-sided marketplace platform connecting job seekers, employers, vendors, startups, and investors. Built from the ground up with a microservices-first mindset.

→10 independent microservices (8 Go/Gin + 1 FastAPI + 1 Next.js frontend)
→AI-powered chatbot with tool calling via OpenRouter LLM
→PostgreSQL Database-Per-Service pattern (8 isolated DBs)
→AWS S3 for media, WebSocket for real-time notifications
→Live in production with zero critical post-launch issues
GolangNext.js 15FastAPIPostgreSQLDockerAWSAI Agents
● Live↗

HRMS / CRM Platform

Enterprise CRM/PMS Microservice

Contributed to an enterprise CRM/PMS platform by building the HRMS service with employee check-in/check-out, search, and role-based access control across the microservice architecture.

GolangMicroservicesRBACPostgreSQL
● Delivered

Headless WordPress Migration

Performance Optimization via Headless CMS

Migrated a production WordPress site to a headless architecture using Next.js, developed custom WordPress plugins for API exposure, significantly improving performance and page load speeds.

Next.jsWordPressPHPPerformance
● Delivered↗

Greater Wyndham Realtors

Real Estate Platform

Built and integrated VaultRE API for real estate listings and property data, handling full backend and frontend implementation.

PHPWordPressVaultRE API

Full-Stack Developer

TechBrein· Kozhikode, Kerala
CurrentJun 2025 – Present
